reasoning: The HIPAA contingency plan control requires organizations to have a plan for data backup, disaster recovery, and emergency mode operation. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring etcd backups are configured, documenting a disaster recovery plan for pods and workloads, and regularly testing the backup and restore process for the cluster.
title: 164_308_a_7_i: 164.308(a)(7)(i) Contingency plan
